Villagers, confronted by waiver, turn on Shane Rhodes and his mother. Quinn rebuilds. Shane Rhodes attempts to poison dogs, is brought to justice. The village is reborn.

He is invited to join The Zephyr Pavilion by Claire Frost, who offers him shares. Jade Shaw tries to blacklist Cole Mason, unaware that he is culinary god, Andy. A cooking competition, Jade Shaw realizes her mistake. The Celestial Palate is on the verge of bankruptcy after Benny is exposed. Cole Mason leads The Zephyr Pavilion to a comeback.

Leo Lowe empties the shop overnight. He starts over, and his business thrives. Grace Shaw opens a copycat shop, but it gets shut down due to bad taste and poor hygiene. She sells her property and leaves town. Leo Lowe's shop becomes famous throughout the county. Good and evil receive their due, and true craftsmanship endures.

English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Waitress Evelyn is betrayed and humiliated by her fiancé Caleb, abandoned in the rain. Desperate, she reunites with childhood friend Dante, a mafia leader. Evelyn awakens to fight back, exposes the scumbag ex, joins Dante to defeat family plots and business traps. From a discarded nobody to a powerful winner, she gains true love and dignity.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 合约爱好者、婚姻生活、家庭恩怨
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: A fake marriage romance about proud designer Lina Carter and controlling tycoon Ethan Blake, who enter a one year contract for money and status. What begins as a cold transaction turns into intense attraction, hidden obsession, and true love—until the controlling man falls hard for the woman he tried to own.

Chinese Title / 中文剧名: 荆棘之吻偶像复仇亲爱的
Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 名人、从敌人到恋人、浪漫并发症
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Sienna, a top anti-fan, publicly denounces superstar Julian, triggering a huge online storm. Forced by public pressure, she signs a fake couple contract with him and moves into his mansion. Living together, they test each other but gradually fall for each other, accidentally getting involved in a dark capital conspiracy. After betrayals, breakups and life-and-death trials, they join hands to expose the plot, clearing all grievances. Finally, the former enemies become true lovers.

English Title / 英文剧名: Black Gold Rose: The Heir’s Forbidden Song
Chinese Title / 中文剧名: 黑金玫瑰：继承者的禁歌
Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 和解、家庭纠纷、家庭恩怨
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Black heiress Alison was framed and exiled three years ago. Now she returns strongly, teams up with rival capital hunter Kyle, exposes her stepmother's conspiracy with external consortiums, seizes core port assets, settles old family scores. They guard family glory side by side amid love and hate, completing a dark gold counterattack.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 栽培、冒险
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: When an ancient-goddess-reincarnated girl and her "Beauty and the Beast Corps" thwart a revenge-driven elven reincarnation plot, they discover the true enemy is a demon of words from the abyss—and this victory is merely the prelude to a greater game between divine realms and imperial ambitions.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 婚后的爱情、城市、婚姻生活
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Elena, a former brilliant ballerina reduced to a hotel pianist, signs a 6-month contract marriage with Sebastian, a cold and domineering tycoon, to cover her mother’s medical bills. Living together, they go from cautious testing to deep affection, facing family opposition, capital conspiracies and past traumas hand in hand. They save each other, grow together, and finally turn a fake marriage into a lifelong love.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 强弱逆袭、名人、浪漫并发症
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Julian Thorne, a top Hollywood actor and wealthy heir, is cold and lonely, trapped by his controlling family. Aria Miller, a gifted photography student, becomes his assistant to save her family. She sees his true self through her lens; he secretly protects her from danger. As they fight his mother’s schemes and class barriers, they heal each other, break free from their chains, and find love in the light.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 丢失的孩子、复仇、家庭恩怨
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: It tells the story of Anna Hart, the female protagonist, who was raised as an outsider by the Miller family for twenty years. When George fell critically ill, she was ruthlessly cast out by the family. Later, she unexpectedly learns that she is the true heir to the family. She then uncovers the truth behind her mother’s murder two decades ago, ultimately exacting revenge and vindicating her identity.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 神秘、奇幻、赎回
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: As an elite hunter, K-7 gets trapped in a baffling conspiracy when ordered to capture fugitive Spirit Butterfly and extract her memories. Set in near-future Neo Kowloon where memories are traded and modified freely, both are disposable pawns of Project E-7, an initiative creating human-weapon specimens. K-7 turns out to be the biological son of L-0, the project’s core designer, while Spirit Butterfly bears all of L-0’s wiped memories as the vital key. Caught between hunt and escape, they unearth the memory scheme, the hidden mother-son secret and their destined bond step by step. In the finale

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 婚姻生活、婚后的爱情、家庭恩怨
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Mia, a humble waitress, signs a one-year fake marriage with cold tycoon Logan to redeem her late grandma’s pub. Facing rival’s schemes and family intrigues, she fights back bravely, rises from a contract wife to true love, breaks biases and wins her life.

Chinese Title / 中文剧名: 影子女继承人：隐藏的真相
Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 复仇、家庭恩怨、错误的身份
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Orphan Selene is taken to a manor by ambitious heir Damian, forced to impersonate missing heiress Eve due to their identical looks. With psychologist Noah’s secret help, she exposes plots of drugging, surveillance and identity forgery, fights back, regains her true identity and redeems herself.

Chinese Title / 中文剧名: 隐藏的女继承人和秘密誓言
Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 合约爱好者、婚姻生活、家庭恩怨
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Anna, a struggling lawyer, signs a hidden marriage contract with cold-hearted tycoon heir Lucas to save her seriously ill mother. Caught in a brutal family power struggle, she faces plots from the stepmother, ex-fiancée and hidden schemers. From tentative suspicion and fierce rivalry, they join forces to expose dark family secrets. Breaking all shackles, they finally choose to walk side by side with independence.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 职场、合约爱好者、商业竞赛
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Fallen PR expert Ivy gets entangled in Klein Shipping’s inheritance storm while probing her mother’s disappearance. Heir Lucas is trapped in scandals. Teaming up, they fight his scheming cousin, crooked lawyer and fake engagement plot. Uncovering decade-old forged trusts and dock bombing secrets, they tear open the cracks in the capital crown.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 错误的身份、家庭与道德、家庭恩怨
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Avery Kingsley, a hidden wealthy heiress, abandons her noble identity to accompany her husband Julian to start a business and secretly pave the way for his career. Right before his company goes public, Julian looks down on Avery and files for a divorce. Heartbroken, Avery returns to take charge of the powerful Kingsley Group. Julian later realizes his so-called business empire is entirely built by Avery. Amid fierce business struggles and family intrigues, Avery breaks free from the past and becomes a strong independent leader.

Chinese Themes / 中文题材: 奇幻、强弱逆袭、行动
English Description Preview / 英文简介预览: Awakening the Day of Reckoning
